data.arabic_text: ((سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (ثلاثاً وثلاثين) وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (أربعاً وثلاثينَ))).
data.english_text: (How Perfect Allah is. (thirty-three times) All praise is for Allah.(thirty-three times) Allah is the greatest.(thirty-four times))

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Subhanal-lah. (thirty-three times) Alhamdu lillah. (thirty-three times) Allahu akbar. (thirty-four times))
